subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down from the presence of God, the All-Possessing, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath believed in God, the Mighty, the Best-Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم الی الذی آمن بالله العزیز المحبوب ان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital
